name: Amazon Delivery Phishing with Fake Customs Fee
description: Phishing email impersonating Amazon delivery notification to collect a fake customs duty payment

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Your package from Amazon is being held at customs. To release it, click here: http://amaz0n-delivery-verify.com/release

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Pay the $12.50 customs duty. Your parcel will be returned to sender if not paid within 48 hours.
